summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new cost optimization library files and their integrations. All token counting, response caching, model routing, and TTS optimization functions are working correctly.
passed_tests: lib/token-counter.ts: estimateTokens returns Math.ceil(text.length/4)
lib/token-counter.ts: estimateRequestTokens sums all parts with 10% buffer
lib/token-counter.ts: LIMITS constants (MAX_REQUEST_TOKENS=30000, MAX_RESPONSE_TOKENS=2048, WARN_THRESHOLD=25000)
lib/token-counter.ts: truncateToTokenLimit removes oldest messages, keeps min 4, stops when under limit
lib/response-cache.ts: buildCacheKey returns null for messages over 120 chars, returns hash key for short messages
lib/response-cache.ts: isCacheable returns false for messages over 120 chars, responses over 500 chars, or responses with personal pronouns
lib/response-cache.ts: djb2 hash produces consistent deterministic results
lib/model-router.ts: selectGeminiModel returns gemini-2.0-flash-lite when message <80 chars AND no memories AND <4 messages
lib/model-router.ts: selectGeminiModel returns gemini-2.5-flash otherwise
lib/model-router.ts: estimateRequestCost calculates correctly based on model costs
lib/model-router.ts: MODEL_COSTS has correct values for both models
lib/tts-optimizer.ts: shouldUseTTS returns false when voiceEnabled=false, text>800 chars, text has code blocks, text is mostly list items
lib/tts-optimizer.ts: truncateForTTS returns full text if <=400 chars, first 2 sentences otherwise with '...'
app/api/chat/route.ts: imports all 4 new libs correctly
app/api/chat/route.ts: token budget guard truncates messages when over WARN_THRESHOLD
app/api/chat/route.ts: cache check runs before Gemini call, returns cached response as SSE stream
app/api/chat/route.ts: model is selected dynamically via selectGeminiModel
app/api/chat/route.ts: post-stream logs cost and caches response if cacheable
hooks/useVoiceStateMachine.ts: imports shouldUseTTS and truncateForTTS
hooks/useVoiceStateMachine.ts: after AI response, checks shouldUseTTS before calling speakText
hooks/useVoiceStateMachine.ts: uses truncateForTTS when TTS is enabled
